sourceMovie.title: The Protector
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto The Protector (2005) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Undisputed II: Last Man Standing
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Protector clicked for you, Undisputed II: Last Man Standing (2006) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Protector?
faq.answer: Try Undisputed II: Last Man Standing, The Substitute, Kickboxer—each shares DNA with The Protector while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Protector?
faq.answer: The Protector (2005) is best described as Action, Crime, Drama, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Protector part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Protector Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
